stimulus.content: People around the world celebrate different holidays, eat different foods, and follow different traditions. These cultural traits often reflect the history, geography, and beliefs of each region.

stem: Which TWO examples best show how cultural traits vary across regions?

choices.text: People in Japan eat rice daily while Mexicans eat corn tortillas
Diwali is celebrated in India while Thanksgiving is celebrated in the U.S.
All countries around the world speak the same language
Every culture celebrates the exact same holidays

answer_explanation: Different food traditions (rice vs. corn tortillas) and different holidays (Diwali vs. Thanksgiving) are clear examples of how cultural traits vary by region based on history and geography.
